creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
ClamAV module again broken after upgrade to 0.11 due to use .tar.gz tarball
instead of .tar.bz2 as it set in Makefile (USE_BZIP2=yes).

How-To-Repeat: $ WITH_CLAMAV=yes make clean extract
===>  Cleaning for proftpd-1.3.2a
===>  Found saved configuration for proftpd-1.3.2
===>  Extracting for proftpd-1.3.2a
=> MD5 Checksum OK for mod_clamav-0.11rc.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for mod_clamav-0.11rc.tar.gz.
bzip2: /usr/ports/distfiles//mod_clamav-0.11rc.tar.gz is not a bzip2 file.
(cd /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd/work && /usr/bin/gzip -nf -9 -dc /usr/ports/distfiles//mod_clamav-0.11rc.tar.gz | /usr/bin/tar -xf - --no-same-owner)
cp: /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd/work/proftpd-1.3.2a/contrib is not a directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd.
